title: eBike Flow app: your eBike gets smart.

headers.text: Utilize the full potential of your eBike
Park your eBike. Enjoy your time out.
Use your Kiox 300 or Kiox 500 as a key
Unlock your eBike manually using your phone
Protect a valuable component of your eBike
All the data is always at hand
Quick help in the event of theft
How to create your account for the eBike Flow app
Turn your phone into an eBike display
Automatically record and analyze riding data
Connect the eBike Flow app with your favorite apps
Customize and arrive without detours: Version 1.30

paragraphs: Your eBike. Now smart.
The eBike Flow app is the core of our smart system and gives you a better, connected riding experience: safer, more personalized, and more convenient.
Download from the App StoreNow on Google Play
Free additional theft protection

eBike Lock is free of charge for all eBikes with the smart system. When you switch on your eBike, it automatically checks that your phone, which acts as a digital key, is nearby. Only then, the motor support will be enabled and your eBike will unlock.

It's as intuitive as it sounds: Simply remove the display from the mount and stow it away. This immediately provides additional protection for your eBike. Reinsert the display and use it to activate motor support before riding off.
Instead of automatic unlocking, you can unlock your eBike manually using your phone via a button on the home screen.
With Battery Lock, you can also protect your eBike battery digitally: This function ensures that your battery can no longer be used if it is stolen.
For Battery Lock, you can use several digital keys at the same time: Your smartphone with the eBike Flow app and your Kiox 300 or Kiox 500.
Battery Lock is available as a premium service from Flow+. Try Flow+ for free – for 12 months with the ConnectModule. Without ConnectModule, you get one month free.
Whether you're just briefly parking your eBike or are away for a longer time: You stay connected via your phone and can relax.
Your eBike warns with acoustic signals and illuminated LEDs when it registers movements or is moved. You also receive a notification on your phone.
If your eBike moves significantly, you can use the tracking function to track its location.

With the eBike pass, you receive an overview of important information about your eBike. Data relating to your eBike is stored here. You can also add details manually – even independently of eBike Alarm.
If your eBike is stolen, you can create a document containing all the important information about the incident for the police, based on the data from the eBike pass – and add a live tracking link.
Invisible to thieves. Visible to everyone.
Digitally mark your stolen bike to clearly flag it as stolen This increases the chances of recovering your eBike.
Enhance your riding experience
To use the eBike Flow app, you need an account – the SingleKey ID. With the SingleKey ID, you can access the eBike Flow app and other Bosch digital services with a single login.
Connect your eBike by following the instructions in the eBike Flow app. So you can use the most important functions.
Once you register the eBike in your name, you can make full use of all the functions of the eBike Flow app.
Flow+ offers you even more functions and premium services for your eBike with the smart system.
Explore and experience
Select the route profile and map details that suit your journey. Plan your own routes with multiple stops or import existing ones from komoot.

The navigation function for Kiox 300, Kiox 400C and Kiox 500 takes you precisely to your destination – with turn-by-turn directions and clear route guidance. If you have subscribed to Flow+, you will get even more map details on your display.
You can use the ride screen with the SmartphoneGrip. It not only shows you all the important riding data, but also offers detailed navigation with 3D map display – even in portrait format.

The eBike Flow app records your riding data as soon as you set off. In the statistics, you will find valuable insights into your ride and fitness data – to analyze and share. If you so wish, all data can also be automatically synchronized with Apple Health.
Transfer your routes from komoot to the eBike Flow app, synchronize your activities with Strava, and share your successes with your friends or your community.
As individual as you are

Configure your Kiox 300, Kiox 400C, or Kiox 500 display according to your needs. Create new screens with your favorite information. Choose from over 30 display options and arrange them according to preference.
Adjusting and customizing
Support, dynamics, maximum torque, and top speed – you decide what you need. You can also put together your favorite riding modes. Choose from all the riding modes available for your eBike.
More power when it counts
Determine the performance values of your drive unit yourself – and set them in the custom riding modes of the eBike Flow app. For example, you can overtake more easily or accelerate faster.¹
Added smart features for you
With the Flow+ subscription, you get the most out of your eBike – with premium services for more comfort, control, and convenience.
Updates ensure that your eBike is always up-to-date and gets even better. You can simply download new eBike functions and transfer them to your eBike via Bluetooth.
The eBike Flow app becomes your digital garage: you can add up to six eBikes to your account – and switch back and forth between them easily.

Your Bosch eBike dealer can synchronize the data of your service appointments with the eBike Flow app. Simply tap on "My eBike" in the app settings to find documentation of the work performed on your eBike during maintenance.

After the ride, find out the CO₂ emissions you saved compared to traveling by car.The emissions saved relate to the use phase. The calculation is based on the German Federal Environment Agency’s assumptions (2022): Car = 266 g CO₂/p-mi, eBike = 5 g CO₂/p-mi
If your eBike is stolen, you can now mark it as stolen in the eBike Flow app. This increases your chances of getting your eBike back.
Increase the performance values of the Performance Line SX, customize the screens of Kiox 400C to suit your preferences, and follow imported routes exactly.
Experience more power with the Performance Upgrade and dynamic support with the new eMTB+ riding mode. Flow+ gives you four new premium services.
There are plenty of good reasons to choose an eBike with the Bosch system – discover the right one for you.

You can adjust the performance values for the following new drive units of the smart system: Cargo Line (BDU384Y), Performance Line PX (BDU347Y), Performance Line Speed (BDU388Y),Performance Line Sport (BDU347Y), Performance Line CX (BDU384Y). From fall 2025: Performance Line SX (BDU314Y), Performance Line Sprint (BDU314Y).

Higher performance values also mean higher wear and lower range – we leave this individual decision up to you. The eBike manufacturer can limit the maximum performance values in the factory setting. In the eBike Flow app, you can then only set the maximum values specified by the manufacturer.
Stay up to date. Exciting stories, interesting news, and practical information straight to your inbox.
Our website is available for different regions and in different languages.Please make your selection from the options below.

Digital functions shape the eBike experience on every ride. Use this development as an opportunity for your company: create innovative business models, optimize your processes, and develop new digital solutions for your customers.

Presented exclusively at the CES: the new "Mark eBike as stolen" feature for the eBike Flow app. Digitally mark your stolen bike to clearly flag it as stolen This increases the chances of recovering your eBike.
